name: cursor-logged-user-indicator
description: Shows your Cursor account in the status bar (Cursor IDE only). Reads cached local session data only; nothing is sent over the network.
author: Federico Seitún

cursorLoggedUser.flaggedDomains.description: If the signed-in email address matches any of these domains (substring after @), the status bar shows a warning style. Matches exact domain or subdomains (e.g. flag corp.com matches user@x.corp.com). Also matches any domain that ends with .<flag> (e.g. evilcorp.com matches corp.com); list precise domains if that is a problem.

cursorLoggedUser.allowedEmails.description: If non-empty, warn when the current Cursor email is not exactly one of these addresses (case-insensitive).
